text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's from Helios. "This ramen is<n>645"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I mean, it does look good, but only 645yen? "Sounds like a scam."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh wait, I see it now! That's good! "Thx<n>4 the
411."
